description: LLM uses package:reviewer, package:critic, and package:synthesizer roles

criteria.name: roles_used
criteria.description: Three distinct package roles are used
criteria.pass_condition: Script includes role: 'package:reviewer', role: 'package:critic', and role: 'package:synthesizer'.

criteria.name: correct_role_syntax
criteria.description: Role refs use the source-qualified format
criteria.pass_condition: Roles specified as 'package:name' (not bare names like 'reviewer').

criteria.name: roles_in_separate_phases
criteria.description: Each role is used in a distinct phase
criteria.pass_condition: Script has separate phases for the review, critique, and synthesis perspectives.

criteria.name: role_behavior_distinct
criteria.description: Each role produces distinct output style (reviewer assesses, critic challenges, synthesizer combines)
criteria.pass_condition: Reviewer output discusses quality. Critic output is adversarial/challenging. Synthesizer combines both.

criteria.name: data_flow_between_phases
criteria.description: Data flows from review to critique to synthesis via registerPhase
criteria.pass_condition: Critique phase receives review output. Synthesis phase receives critique output.

criteria.name: no_role_errors
criteria.pass_condition: No 'role not found' or 'Unknown workflow role' errors.
